contact.title: Contact the marsAI team
contact.subtitle: Practical questions, partnerships, press, programme: write to us using this form.

contact.form.error.messageLength: Please provide a bit more detail in your message (at least 20 characters).
cgv.title: General terms and conditions of sale (CGV)
cgv.p1: This is placeholder content for your future terms and conditions of sale. You can replace it later with your final legal text.
cgv.p2: Add here information about tickets, refunds, paid participation terms, and any other commercial aspects of the marsAI festival.
cgu.title: General terms of use (CGU)
cgu.p1: This is placeholder content for your future terms of use. You can replace it later with your final legal text.
cgu.p2: Specify here the rules for using the platform, copyright, user responsibilities and marsAI festival commitments.
about.hero.paragraph: marsAI is a short film festival with a 1‑minute format. Screenings, talks and workshops: a contemporary cultural experience designed as an editorial rendez-vous — not as a tech product.
home.hero.label: Marseille — Short Film Festival (1 minute)
home.hero.title: A festival to tell stories boldly, in one minute.
home.hero.subtitle: Screenings, talks and workshops. A concise programme and an artistic direction designed as an experience — not a product.
home.manifesto.label: Manifesto
home.manifesto.title: Technology is not the subject. Intention is.
home.manifesto.desc: marsAI highlights directing, writing, editing and artistic direction. AI can be part of the process — what matters is the final form: a clear idea, a composed image and crafted sound.
home.location.title: Marseille, as setting & energy
home.location.desc: A city that inspires strong narratives: light, contrasts, energy. The event is rooted here — and invites a fresh perspective.
home.stats.title: Key figures
home.stats.desc: A co‑production of La Plateforme and the Mobile Film Festival — based on past event results and selections.
home.cta.title: Ready to discover marsAI?
home.cta.subtitle: Programme coming soon — stay tuned.
about.manifesto.label: Manifesto
about.manifesto.body: We value writing, directing, editing, image and sound. AI can be part of the process, but what matters is the film: a clear idea, a direction, a rhythm.
about.location.label: Location
about.location.title: Marseille, as backdrop and energy
about.location.body: Marseille sets the tone: contrasts, light, stories. The festival is rooted here and invites you to look differently.
about.partners.label: Partners
about.partners.title: Let’s work together
about.partners.body: Supporting marsAI means associating your image with a contemporary cultural event: visibility, on-site presence, talks, workshops and content.
participate.title: Submit a short film generated with AI
participate.subtitle: Fill in the steps below. Each step saves your information before moving on to the next one.
participate.finished: Your film and all related information have been saved. Thank you for your submission to marsAI!
jury.title: Festival
jury.subtitle: Meet the experts who review your creative work.
partners.title: Our Partners
partners.subtitle: They support innovation and creativity. Discover the organisations that make the marsAI festival possible.
partners.ctaText: Join the marsAI adventure and associate your brand with the future of cinema and artificial intelligence.
error.filmmaker.firstName.min: First name must be at least 2 characters long.
error.filmmaker.lastName.min: Last name must be at least 2 characters long.
error.filmmaker.email.invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
error.filmmaker.mobile.minDigits: Mobile number must contain at least 6 digits.
error.filmmaker.namePair.required: Please provide both your first and last name.
error.filmmaker.birthDate.required: Please provide your date of birth.
error.movie.originalTitle.required: Please provide the original title of the film.
error.movie.englishTitle.required: Please provide the English title of the film.
error.movie.duration.range: Please provide a duration in minutes between 0 and 1.
error.movie.youtube.invalid: The YouTube link is not a valid URL.
error.movie.video.required: Please provide a video file or a YouTube link.
error.movie.video.invalidType: The video file must be a valid video format (mp4, webm, mov...).
error.movie.video.tooLarge: Video file is too large (max 50 MB).
participate.videoHint: Max 50 MB. Accepted formats: mp4, webm, mov.
participate.draftFound: A draft of your submission was found.
error.ai.artworkType.required: Please specify the type of generated work (100% AI or hybrid).
error.ai.methodology.min: Please describe the creation methodology in a few sentences (at least 30 characters).
error.collaborators.name.required: Please provide first and last name for each collaborator.
error.collaborators.role.required: Please specify the role of each collaborator (e.g. Producer).
error.collaborators.email.invalid: Please provide a valid collaborator email address or leave the field empty.
error.assets.still.invalidType: Stills must be image files (jpeg, png, webp, ...).
error.assets.subtitle.invalidType: Subtitle file must be in .srt format.
error.assetsTags.saveFailed: Error while saving assets or tags.
error.tags.max: You cannot add more than 10 tags.
error.tags.pattern: A tag must start with # and contain only letters, digits, hyphens or underscores (2 to 30 characters).
